name: Zero Risk — Phase Gate Evidence Collector (Webhook)
description: Called by NEXUS orchestrator after each phase. Validates phase output against success criteria. Performs structural validation (required fields present), semantic validation (calls editor-en-jefe agent to check brand alignment + Schwartz copywriting principles), gathers evidence (screenshots via web_fetch for landing pages + competitive context). Returns verdict: PASS | RETRY | FAIL with detailed evidence. Writes audit trail to phase_gate_audits table. Used by NEXUS workflow to gate phase advancement.
trigger: Webhook POST /webhook/evidence-collector with { phase_name, phase_output, success_criteria }
kpis: Phase gate pass rate (% of phases passing first try)
